{{Quote|Hello. Are you here to see the Guardian?|Evlyn Tabory|<ref name="SQ" />}}
'''Evlyn Tabory''' was the daughter of [[Rosemari Pressor Tabory]], the niece of [[Jorad Pressor]], and the granddaughter of [[Dillian Pressor]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|No. Please, Ambassador. I don't want to do this. I don't want to be a Jedi.|Evlyn Tabory to Dean Jinzler|<ref name="SQ" />}}
Evlyn was born on [[Outbound Flight Colony|the Outbound Flight Colony]] around [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] and helped her uncle in his duties as [[Guardian of the People]], using her [[The Force/Legends|Force]] powers to manipulate intruders into falling into traps set around the [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaughts]]. Evlyn was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], a fact that [[Rosemari Pressor Tabory|Rosemari]] and [[Jorad Pressor|Jorad]] covered up to prevent her from being exiled to [[Dreadnaught-Three|''D-Three'']]. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] invited her to train at the [[Jedi Praxeum]], but though she wanted to, she instead went with her mother and [[Dean Jinzler]] to live in the Empire of the Hand after the [[Survivors (Outbound Flight)|Survivors]] were rescued from [[The Redoubt/Legends|The Redoubt]].<ref name="SQ" />

==Behind the scenes==
Evlyn first appeared in the [[2006]] novel ''[[Outbound Flight (novel)|Outbound Flight]]'' by [[Timothy Zahn]].<ref name="SQ" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' {{Ab|Survivor's Quest (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
